notes: This expected fixture describes the bounded candidate prompt produced during Class 2 clarification.
Candidate choices are guidance only and must not be interpreted as validator output, actuator command, emergency trigger, or doorlock authorization.

LLM-mode allowance (scenario_manifest_rules.md §7.5): the per-candidate candidate_id_is_static_mode_literal / candidate_id_is_llm_normalized_literal flags identify which literal id values are stable in llm_generated mode. Static-mode literals (C1_LIGHTING_ASSISTANCE, C2_CAREGIVER_HELP, C4_CANCEL_OR_WAIT) may be replaced by LLM-emitted ids in llm_generated mode — match on candidate_transition_target instead. The CLASS_0 candidate (C3_EMERGENCY_HELP) is normalized by the adapter and remains literally fixed across both modes.
